"'''''Knights of the Old Republic: Opportunities'''''" is a three-part ''[[Star Wars Miniatures]]'' mini-adventure published on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] website in October/November [[2006]]. It was written by [[Sterling Hershey]]. It concerns the crew of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] ship ''[[Darkmoon]]'', and is set just after [[Darth Malak]] assumes control of the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] in [[3957 BBY]].

==Plot summary==
This summary tells of the story as if the Republic won all of their battles, except the last.

After the apparent death of [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]], [[Darth Malak]] takes command of the new [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] forces. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] believe that the best time to strike the Sith is now. An unknown [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] has heard of a hidden research facility that has been producing advanced [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. The Dark Jedi assembles a team of:

*2 [[Sith trooper (Sith Empire)|Sith Troopers]]
*1 Sith Trooper Commander
*1 Sith [[Assault droid|Assault Droid]]
*1 [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark Side]] Enforcer
*1 Dark Jedi

With the Dark Jedi being the leader himself. The Sith leader hires a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] ship, called the ''[[Darkmoon]]'', to hide his crew from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. The Dark Jedi wants the mission to be secret, but the Republic learns of it anyway and sends their own strike team, consisting of:

*2 [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] Soldiers
*2 Old Republic Commanders
*1 [[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Jedi Sentinel]]
*1 [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]]
*1 [[Jedi Consular]]

This strike team is to intercept the Darkmoon. After successfully defeating the Sith crew, the Jedi strike team teams up with the mercenaries on the Darkmoon and they land near the facility, but all they find is a group of pirates and one advanced droid, called [[HK-47]]. The Darkmoon is also heavily damaged and needs new parts. The Jedi and mercenary team now consists of:

*1 Jedi Guardian
*1 Old Republic Commander
*1 Old Republic Soldier
*1 [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]] Mercenary Soldier
*1 [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] Pilot
*1 [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Fringer/Legends|Fringer]]
*1 [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Soldier/Legends|Soldier]]
*1 [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]] Soldier

Their mission is now to get the needed parts for the Darkmoon and to secure HK-47. The [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] team is made up of:

*HK-47
*1 [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Assassin/Legends|Assassin]]
*1 [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] Fringer
*1 [[Human/Legends|Human]] Mercenary
*1 [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] Mercenary
*1 [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Security guard/Legends|Guard]]
*[[T3-R5]]
*1 [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] [[Smuggler/Legends|Smuggler]]

The team of Jedi and mercenaries succeeds in defeating the pirates and securing the advanced droid. A Republic rescue ship soon arrives and eliminates the last of the pirates, however, after searching the pirate base, the team of Jedi and mercenaries discover that the pirates had planned to meet and sell the advanced droid to Darth Malak, at an unguarded location. The strike team decides to travel to the meeting location and defeat Darth Malak, with a strike force composed of:

*1 Jedi Guardian
*1 Jedi Consular
*1 Old Republic Commander
*2 Old Republic Soldiers
*1 Shistavanen Pilot
*1 [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|Bodyguard]]

The team arrives at the location, where they find:

*Darth Malak
*1 Dark Jedi Master
*1 Dark Jedi

Unfortunately, the Republic team is unable to defeat Malak and the whole strike force is defeated.
